## Summary

Describe the problem and the change in a few sentences.

## Testing

List the commands, test suites, or manual checks you actually ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to one problem or one closely related slice of work.
- [ ] I linked the relevant issue or explained why this PR stands alone.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs, configuration examples, or screenshots when needed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, sensitive transcripts, or private recordings.
